Sched: Conditionally fire VIF triggers only on value change Sched: Conditionally fire VIF triggers only on value change ## Situation:
I'm attempting to run the testbenches in https://github.com/pulp-platform/axi using Verilator. I'm running into a few issues, some of which I am initially working around in https://github.com/pulp-platform/axi/tree/open_ci. Something that is coming up is an issue that looks to be similar to #5116, which is harder to work around. To test, the `axi_sim_mem` testben
